title: unwrap() on header value parses in security_headers middleware
description: server.rs security_headers(): each .parse().unwrap() on the static string literals ('nosniff', 'DENY', 'same-origin', the CSP string, 'no-store') will panic if the literal is ever changed to contain non-ASCII or is replaced with a runtime value. The idiomatic fix is HeaderValue::from_static() for literals, which is const-checked and infallible. Using .parse().unwrap() on static strings is a latent panic risk and a clippy::unwrap_in_result concern, and hides the fact that these are const values.
